title: Rapid column Ag test
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"eckdg","text":"The \"Rapid Ag test based on Alpaca Nanobodies\" is a test developed with single domain antibodies. This type of antibody is capable of effectively recognize the Spike protein on the surface of SARS-CoV2 leading a signal that is 10 times stronger than conventional antibodies. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1b8v7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eq65k","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9q134","text":"It takes only 16  minutes from sample to result. The procedures for using this test were designed to ensure an easy use and interpretation, making it a quick and simple test.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Add 3 mL of collection buffer to sample collection tube and collect saliva in sample collection tube (3-5mL) wait 5 minutes
Mix binding buffer tube, load 1 drop of binding buffer into Column connected to a vacuum device
Load sample into column, turn on vacuum device, and let sample go through column wait 5 minutes
Add 12mL of washing buffer 1, turn on vacuum device, and let washing buffer go through column
Add 6 mL of washing buffer 2, turn on vacuum device, and let washing buffer go through column
Add 12 mL of washing buffer 1, turn on vacuum device, and let washing buffer go through column
Wait 5 min to visualize reaction blue color = positive, white color = negative
creator: Berking Biotechnology
